name: Total Defense: Three Kingdoms
short_description: "Total Defense: Three Kingdoms" is a tower defense game set against the epic saga of Han. Command legendary generals transformed into unique defense towers, as you battle through 32 campaigns. Every general’s tower is a beacon rewriting history—where tactical brilliance ignites the flames of legend.
detailed_description:
Total Defense: Three Kingdoms

Total Defense: Three Kingdoms is an immersive strategic tower defense game centered on the legendary tales of Shu-Han. As a battlefield commander, you’ll wield iconic defense towers incarnated by heroes like Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhao Yun across 32 epic campaigns—from the Oath of the Peach Garden to the Battle of Yiling. Forge your ultimate defense matrix through a unique fusion of card-enhanced tactics and talent tree progression: unleash Guan Yu’s devastating critical strikes, summon Kong Ming’s celestial firestorms to decimate legions, and witness the Three Kingdoms’ chaos unfold like a living watercolor scroll!

Core Features

▶ Heroic Towers · Legends as Fortifications

  • Nine Unique Hero Towers:

   o Guan Yu Tower: High critical hit chance + critical damage boost

   o Zhao Yun Tower: Mastery in dodging + piercing attacks

   o Kong Ming Tower: Devastating Elemental assaults

   o Ma Chao Tower: Doubled defensive efficiency

  • Historically Inspired Skills:

   o Awe Across Nations: Annihilates all on-screen enemies

   o Roar of Fury: Terrifies foes with area-wide debuffs

   o East Wind: Transforms enemy projectiles into harmless rain

   o Green Medical: Restores tower health

▶ Cards × Talents · Infinite Strategic Depth

  • Four Card Types:

   o Attribute Cards: Permanently boost tower stats

   o Skill Cards: Unlock legendary abilities

   o Enhancement Cards: Upgrade existing skills

   o Kismet Cards: Trigger unexpected effects

  • Three-Dimensional Progression:

   o Leveling System: Earn XP to gain new levels and passive bonuses

   o Talent Tree: Customize tower evolution paths via talent points

   o Gold Economy: Spend battle-earned gold to purchase cards and unlock elite skills

▶ Dynamic Warfare · Outsmart the Horde

  • Unit & Skill Mechanics:

   o Cavalry excel at raids but are forced into detours by fortification barriers

   o Army Breaker skill not only cleaves enemies but deflects attacks such as fireballs

   o Use Flowerfall skill to blast enemies away

  • Scalable Difficulty:

   o Easy Mode: Weaken enemy waves + auto-supply

   o Active Enemy Cap: Adjust enemy army scale

   o Nightmare Mode: Enhanced enemy waves + resource caps

Tagline

"Five Tiger Generals as towers, Thirty-Six Stratagems as cards! Forge your legend in the ink-stained battlefields of the Three Kingdoms!"
